system.summary: 1d6 fire damage... +1d6 per round of concentration.

effect.notes: Choose 1-10 rounds of concentration; damage increases by 1d6 per round.

description.value: The mutant can inflict heat damage on living tissue or anything reasonably flammable, such as wood or plastic, and may eventually set the target ablaze. On the first melee turn the power inflicts 1d6 damage, not necessarily from open flame. With uninterrupted concentration, the damage rises by 1d6 each turn until it reaches 10d6 on the 10th melee turn. The referee determines whether and when fire actually begins. Range is 25 meters.
